customer_rule: Do not show generic mKs. Do not default to Believe in Love. Do not default to Love Renews. Do not show artist names. If Thank You scripted inventory is not loaded, return an inventory-prep message instead of showing the wrong product.

hero_copy.headline: FIND THE RIGHT WORDS!
hero_copy.offer_line: Send Mom something she has never, ever received: a GPM HUG for Mother’s Day.
hero_copy.footer_note: Mother’s Day HUGs are curated K-KUT gifts. No generic mini-KUTs are shown in this holiday flow. Thank You inventory is being scripted for Verse 1, Verse 2, Chorus 3, Outro, and bite-size HUG options.
